name: fluxnet-annual-2026
postCreateCommand: Rscript -e 'if (file.exists("R/pipeline_config.R")) { source("R/pipeline_config.R"); check_pipeline_config() } else { message("R/pipeline_config.R not yet created — skipping pipeline config check.") }'

AMERIFLUX_USER_NAME.description: Your registered AmeriFlux account name. Register at https://ameriflux.lbl.gov/login/

AMERIFLUX_INTENDED_USE.description: AmeriFlux intended use code: 1=Synthesis, 2=Model, 3=Remote sensing, 4=Other research, 5=Education, 6=Other. Default: 1 (network synthesis analysis).

FLUXNET_SHUTTLE_VERSION.description: Expected version of fluxnet-shuttle. Default: 0.2.0. Change only if intentionally upgrading.

FLUXNET_SNAPSHOT_MODE.description: Pipeline mode: 'development' (re-queries Shuttle) or 'locked' (uses committed snapshot). Default: development.

FLUXNET_SNAPSHOT_FILE.description: Path to committed snapshot CSV. Required only when FLUXNET_SNAPSHOT_MODE=locked.
